creator: joeb@a1poweruser.com
text:
Your to quick to close this problem. You did not read the problem correctly
or follow what
the bug report says while doing your testing.
The problem is not selecting cancel on the main screen to exit, but after
selecting
the option 1 and entering the next screen is where there is no way to get
out.
In sysinstall there is the Q=quit option to exit that screen. Maybe you need
to play with
sysinstall to see how it works before making a determination that sade is
working correctly.

And if you really trust sade then plug in a USB stick and try to slice and
label it and see what happens.
